message:
fix(palette): correct line position calculation for scroll sync

Fixes bugs in the scrolling implementation:

1. Added visualPosToLineNum() helper that properly calculates line numbers
   accounting for section headers and blank lines between sections
   (pinned, recents, categories each add header + blank lines)

2. Fixed PageUp/PageDown/HalfPage handlers - they were incorrectly using
   viewport.YOffset (a line number) as an index into visualOrder (item array).
   Now they move cursor by a fixed number of items and call ensureCursorVisible()
   to sync the viewport.

3. Improved ensureCursorVisible() to use the accurate line position mapping
   and handle edge cases (negative offset clamping)

The cursor and viewport now stay properly synchronized during all navigation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
